content.text:
Looking at the chart, I need to identify the 2021 top-5 teams and check their 2022 positions.

From the right-side (2022) column, the standings show:
- 1 Arsenal, 2 Man City, 3 Newcastle, 4 Tottenham, 5 Man United, 6 Brighton, 7 Aston Villa, 8 Liverpool, 9 Brentford, 10 Fulham, **11 Chelsea**...

Chelsea is at position 11 in 2022 (outside the top 10). In 2021, Chelsea was 3rd (the 2021-22 season: Man City, Liverpool, Chelsea, Tottenham, Arsenal being the top 5).

<think>
The chart spans seasons labeled by year. In 2021 (2021-22 season), the top 5 were: Man City, Liverpool, Chelsea, Tottenham, Arsenal. In 2022 (2022-23 season), Chelsea dropped to 11th — outside the top 10. All other 2021 top-5 teams (Man City 2nd, Arsenal 1st, Tottenham 4th, Liverpool 8th) remained in the top 10 in 2022.
</think>

<answer>
Chelsea — they were 3rd in the top-5 in 2021, but dropped to 11th (outside the top 10) in 2022.
</answer>
